title: Incorrect evaluation of signed comparisons involving ternary expressions and negation

features.name: signed wire from ternary with width-mismatched operands
features.description: Code should include a signed wire assigned from a ternary expression where the true branch is a multi-bit constant (2'b10) and the false branch is zero with different bit width

features.name: comparison of negated signed value with original signed value
features.description: Code should include a comparison between a negated signed wire and the original signed wire used as the condition of a ternary expression

features.name: signed unary negation in comparison expression
features.description: Code should include a unary negation operator applied to a signed wire within a comparison expression
